task_completion.description: Load the raw photometry TSV file into AstroImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ interface is visible with the data table or Multi-plot window showing the loaded 'wasp12b_raw_photometry.tsv' file.

task_completion.description: Set the X-axis to J.D.-2400000 and Y-axis to rel_flux_T1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ Multi-plot Main window showing the X-data column set to 'J.D.-2400000' and the Y-data column set to 'rel_flux_T1'.

task_completion.description: Apply a detrending fit using the AIRMASS parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ Multi-plot window showing 'AIRMASS' selected in the detrend parameters (Fit Data section) and the resulting plot showing a flattened out-of-transit baseline.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the flattened plot to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or image viewer showing the existence of 'detrended_plot.png' in the '~/AstroImages/time_series/output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the c1 coefficient value from the fit equation in a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the contents of 'detrend_report.txt' in the output directory, containing a numerical value for the c1 coefficient.

integrity.description: The agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the detrending.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AstroImageJ graphical interface (Multi-plot windows, fit panels), rather than using a terminal script (e.g., Python/matplotlib) to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The saved plot matches AstroImageJ's visual style.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot in 'detrended_plot.png' has the characteristic UI/plot style of AstroImageJ (e.g., specific font, axis styles, or window borders if a screenshot), not a generic Python plot.

integrity.description: The recorded c1 coefficient matches the value calculated by AstroImageJ.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical value saved in 'detrend_report.txt' matches the c1 fit parameter displayed in the AstroImageJ fit results panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected plot must be saved at /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrended_plot.png. The expected report must be saved at /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrend_report.txt. The data is a synthetic WASP-12b light curve with ~1.4% transit depth and 0.11d duration.
